summary: Iteration 150 testing complete. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend features verified: Pastry panel loads without context errors (P0 fix confirmed), Cake Viewer cutaway view with 90° wedge revealing internal filling layers, per-tier fillings editor with color/name/height controls, session save with fillings persisted.

CakeFilling model properly added to backend with defaults (name='Sponge', color='#f5d9a7', height=0.15)
Cutaway implementation uses thetaStart/thetaLength for 90° wedge geometry
